name: Ajay Rathod
title: Aspiring AI Engineer | Python Developer | Machine Learning Enthusiast
bio: I am a BE Computer Science and Engineering student at BLDEA's Dr. P.G. Halakatti College of Engineering and Technology, VTU. I am passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Full Stack Development. I enjoy building AI-powered applications that solve real-world problems and continuously improve my technical skills.

about.education: Bachelor of Engineering (BE) in Computer Science and Engineering, BLDEA's Dr. P.G. Halakatti College of Engineering and Technology, VTU
about.objective: To begin my career as an AI Engineer by applying my knowledge of Python, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Full Stack Development to build intelligent, scalable, and impactful software solutions.

timeline.event: Started learning Python programming and core Computer Science fundamentals.
Learned Machine Learning, Deep Learning and built academic AI projects.
Completed Indian Cattle Breed Detection, Plant Disease Detection and Study Tracker projects.
Developing DePIN Storage Sharing major project and preparing for AI Engineer placements.

projects.title: Indian Cattle Breed Detection
projects.description: An AI-powered computer vision application that identifies Indian cattle breeds using deep learning models.
projects.details: Built using deep learning and computer vision techniques to classify Indian cattle breeds with an interactive web interface.

projects.title: Plant Disease Detection
projects.description: Deep learning based web application that detects plant diseases from leaf images.
projects.details: Uses image classification to identify plant diseases and help farmers with early diagnosis.

projects.title: Study Tracker
projects.description: A study management web application for tracking daily learning progress.
projects.details: Allows users to organize study goals, monitor progress and improve productivity.

projects.title: DePIN Storage Sharing
projects.description: Final year project focused on decentralized storage sharing with token-based resource contribution.
projects.details: A decentralized storage sharing platform where users contribute storage resources and receive reward tokens.

aiAssistant.greeting: Hi, I'm Ajay Rathod. Welcome to my AI-powered portfolio. I'm a Computer Science Engineering student with a strong passion for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Full-Stack Development. This portfolio showcases my projects, certifications, technical skills, and learning journey. Feel free to explore and discover my work. Thank you for visiting!
